title: Microsoft 365 Compliance Management Training
description:
This Technology training covers concepts from the Basic level to advance level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Technology training as per your pace.

Microsoft 365 Compliance Management is a free workflow-based risk assessment tool in the Microsoft Service Trust Portal for managing regulatory compliance activities related to Microsoft cloud services. It is a part of your Microsoft 365, Office 365, or Azure Active Directory subscription. Microsoft Compliance Manager helps you manage regulatory compliance within the shared responsibility model for Microsoft cloud services.The Security & Compliance Center is specifically designed to help you manage compliance features across Microsoft Office 365 for your organization.Compliance Manager uses several components to help you with your compliance management activities. These components work together to provide a complete management work flow and hassle-free compliance reports for auditors.
